name: 天淵深穴
mnemonic: B1 Halberd 戟兵：機械 boss + 直線。
B2 Mecho Tortoise 機甲龜：機械龜 + 圓 AoE。
B3 Salt Doll 鹽偶：多階段 boss 戰。
notes: DT 7.0 DT 主線天淵深穴（Lv 96）。Boss 依序為 Halberd 戟兵、Mecho Tortoise 機甲龜、Salt Doll 鹽偶。重點：依各 boss 機制走位、add 速秒、tankbuster 與 raidwide 配合減傷與團補。

mechanics.description: Party-wide magical damage.；全員預備減傷與大團補。
mechanics.name: Immersion 沉浸

mechanics.description: Gives each player a icon.png Nuisance debuff with the combat message: You are cursed to be a nuisance to the party.... This debuff cause；依預兆走位處理。
mechanics.name: Troublesome Tail 尾

mechanics.description: A telegraphed frontal conal AoE on a random player. Nuisance will cause each player will shoot a narrow untelegraphed conal AoE in front of them once；場上範圍 AoE 預警，看圖示提前走位避開預兆範圍。
mechanics.name: Worrisome Wave 波

mechanics.description: Telegraphed donut AoE that spawns a dangerous AoE at the edge of the arena, compressing it to a smaller circle.；場上範圍 AoE 預警，看圖示提前走位避開預兆範圍。
mechanics.name: Hydro Ring 招式

mechanics.description: Feather Ray produces copious bubbles... Numerous bubbles will originate from the boss and slowly move out, requiring players to dodge. The arena will；依預兆走位處理。
mechanics.name: Blowing Bubbles 翼

mechanics.description: Spawns multiple floating bubbles in a grid formation, leaving some empty spots.；依預兆走位處理。
mechanics.name: Bubble Bomb 炸彈

mechanics.description: A current from the east will shift all bubbles west by one position. Players will need to identify the empty spots considering the shift, because each；依預兆走位處理。
mechanics.name: Rolling Current 滾

mechanics.description: Troublesome Tail are used again, giving everyone icon.png Nuisance.；依預兆走位處理。
mechanics.name: Hydro Bomb 炸彈

mechanics.description: Each player will periodically shoot two slow-moving bubbles in front of where they are facing. Players must avoid being hit by others' bubbles.；依預兆走位處理。
mechanics.name: Trouble Bubbles 麻煩氣泡

bosses.name: 戟兵
mnemonic: Halberd 戟兵 機制：機械 boss + 直線。

mechanics.description: Party-wide magical damage and spawns a dangerous AoE at the edge of the arena.；全屏範圍 AoE 攻擊，全員預備減傷與大團補。
mechanics.name: Dynamic Dominance 招式

mechanics.description: Spawns a blue mirror on one wall and a yellow orb on one corner. The boss will jump to a corner adjacent to the yellow orb and aim a telegraphed line；場上範圍 AoE 預警，看圖示提前走位避開預兆範圍。
mechanics.name: Mirror Maneuver 鏡

mechanics.description: Spawns an orange arrowkey-like glyph on two tiles. These indicate plus-shaped AoEs originating from them.；場上範圍 AoE 預警，看圖示提前走位避開預兆範圍。
mechanics.name: Ancient Artillery 古代炮兵

mechanics.description: The glyphs will expand in the direction of the arrows and explode.；依預兆走位處理。
mechanics.name: Emergent Artillery 緊急炮兵

mechanics.description: Telegraphed physical tankbuster.；MT開大減傷 雙T swap接力。
mechanics.name: Pummel 招式

bosses.name: 機甲龜
mnemonic: Mecho Tortoise 機甲龜 機制：機械龜 + 圓 AoE。

mechanics.description: (Maulskull draws power from its fists!): One of the boss' fists will begin glowing and make a sound effect, followed by the other one, indicating two；依預兆走位處理。
mechanics.name: Stonecarver 石雕師

mechanics.description: Spawns a blue knockback AoE circle at the north or the arena. Also gives each player a spread marker. Players will need to be knocked back leaning tow；擊退 AoE，提前 Arm's Length / Surecast 抗擊退或預判落點。
mechanics.name: Skullcrush 招式
tips: 預判擊退方向或開 Arm's Length

mechanics.description: The boss summons a large purple cube and punches it, telegraphing three sets of circle AoE. During the third set, either one two green arrow telegraph；場上範圍 AoE 預警，看圖示提前走位避開預兆範圍。
mechanics.name: Maulwork 招式

mechanics.description: A tower with a multi-hit stack marker appears. The entire party should soak the tower, causing three hits of physical damage.；隨機點名玩家集合分攤 AoE，全員集合分攤傷害。
mechanics.name: Deep Thunder 招式

mechanics.description: A combination of Stonecarver half-room cleaves and Skullcrush knockback AoE (without the spread markers). Players will need to be knocked back safely；擊退 AoE，提前 Arm's Length / Surecast 抗擊退或預判落點。
mechanics.name: Ringing Blows 響亮之擊
tips: 預判擊退方向或開 Arm's Length

mechanics.description: Telegraphed AoE magical tankbuster.；對 MT 釋放高傷害單體 buster，MT 開大減傷接傷，雙 T swap 接力。
mechanics.name: Wrought Fire 火

mechanics.description: A blue knockback circle will spawn near a lower corner of the arena. In addition, a stack marker will spawn on a random player.；擊退 AoE，提前 Arm's Length / Surecast 抗擊退或預判落點。
mechanics.name: Colossal Impact 巨型衝擊
tips: 預判擊退方向或開 Arm's Length

mechanics.description: Party-wide magical damage.；全員預備減傷與大團補。
mechanics.name: Ashlayer 招式

bosses.name: 鹽偶
mnemonic: Salt Doll 鹽偶 機制：多階段 boss 戰。
